name: HINDALCO  INDUSTRIES  LTD
rationale: Quality non-ferrous play with still-constructive revisions and slightly cheap vs peers; keep as a metals anchor.

name: GRASIM INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Diversified Aditya Birla flagship with strong, rising analyst revisions and in the quant baseline; keep as a core anchor but at baseline weight.

name: CG POWER AND IND SOL LTD
rationale: Capital-goods/electrification structural winner with constructive revisions; keep as a core industrials anchor.

name: BHARAT FORGE LTD
rationale: Auto-components/defense diversification with still-positive revisions; keep near baseline.

name: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: The quintessential conglomerate (energy, retail, telecom); under-weight prior, add toward a proper anchor.

name: CHOLAMANDALAM IN & FIN CO
rationale: High-quality NBFC with positive revisions; the cleanest financials compounder in my book.

name: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD
rationale: Auto+farm-equipment conglomerate, fits the theme; revisions neutral-to-positive, add toward a full anchor weight.

name: WELSPUN CORP LIMITED
rationale: Industrial-products name with neutral-positive revisions; trim slightly from a heavy prior weight.

name: ARVIND LIMITED
rationale: In the quant baseline with constructive revisions; keep near current weight.

name: OIL AND NATURAL GAS CORP.
rationale: Strong analyst revisions plus slight cheapness; a high-ARM large-cap energy add and quant-baseline name.

name: VEDANTA LIMITED
rationale: Diversified-metals conglomerate, thematically core, but revisions are middling and I was over-concentrated across Vedanta entities; consolidate into the parent.

name: LIFE INSURA CORP OF INDIA
rationale: Strong revisions and cheap; large under-owned insurer with a clean ARM tilt.

name: JINDAL STEEL LIMITED
rationale: Mid-cap ferrous with mid-pack revisions; keep a reduced position rather than the full prior weight.

name: COFORGE LIMITED
rationale: Strong, rising analyst revisions in mid/large-cap IT with momentum-led brain support; fresh add.

name: NMDC LTD.
rationale: Strong revisions plus value support; large-cap materials add from the quant baseline.

name: TECH MAHINDRA LIMITED
rationale: IT turnaround with revisions firming relative to peers; keep a measured large-cap IT position.

name: SOLAR INDUSTRIES (I) LTD
rationale: Strong revisions, defense/explosives structural growth; a high-conviction capital-goods add.

name: BAJAJ FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Premier NBFC; revisions only neutral now so keep, do not enlarge.

name: MUTHOOT FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Strong revisions in a gold-loan leader; diversifies my financials beyond banks/auto-NBFCs.

name: TATA STEEL LIMITED
rationale: Revisions have gone flat/neutral; trim the ferrous cyclical exposure but retain a token large-cap anchor.

name: ASIAN PAINTS LIMITED
rationale: Revisions firming off a weak base in a quality consumer franchise; a stabilization tilt.

name: FIRSTSOURCE SOLU. LTD.
rationale: BPM/IT-services name with revisions holding up; keep a mid-weight position.

name: GUJARAT GAS LIMITED
rationale: Strong revisions in city-gas distribution; a fresh energy/utility revision tilt.

name: SIEMENS ENERGY INDIA LTD
rationale: Constructive revisions in power-grid/energy equipment; rides the electrification capex theme alongside CGPOWER.

name: TATA CONSULTANCY SERV LT
rationale: Revisions are only neutral; keep a smaller large-cap IT anchor and let TECHM carry the IT recovery tilt.

name: GLAND PHARMA LIMITED
rationale: Strong revisions in injectables pharma; adds healthcare diversification to a metals-heavy book.

name: TRENT LTD
rationale: Revisions have cooled to neutral after a huge run; trim but keep a consumer-discretionary anchor.

name: ADANI ENTERPRISES LIMITED
rationale: The Adani incubator fits the theme but revisions are now below-neutral; reduce, do not exit.

name: CHENNAI PETROLEUM CORP LT
rationale: Strong revisions plus the cheapest value score in the high-ARM cohort; a refining-margin tilt.

name: M&M FIN. SERVICES LTD
rationale: Revisions have decayed to neutral; trim the rural-NBFC weight.

name: JSW STEEL LIMITED
rationale: Revisions have softened to below-neutral; reduce the ferrous over-concentration across the book.

name: ENGINEERS INDIA LTD
rationale: Strong revisions in an asset-light PSU engineering consultant; capex-cycle proxy.

name: DEEPAK NITRITE LTD
rationale: Strong revisions in specialty chemicals after a long down-cycle; a recovery tilt.

name: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO LTD
rationale: Constructive revisions plus value in aluminium; a low-cost commodity revision tilt.

name: TUBE INVEST OF INDIA LTD
rationale: Murugappa platform but revisions now below-neutral; reduce the weight.

name: HINDUSTAN ZINC LIMITED
rationale: Constructive revisions in a low-cost zinc producer; complements the metals sleeve with a different commodity.

name: THE GE SHPG.LTD
rationale: Constructive revisions plus value in shipping; a diversifying freight-cycle tilt.
